title: 7-Eleven Under Construction at US 17-92 and Bargain Barn Road
summary: A new 7-Eleven is reported under construction at US 17-92 and Bargain Barn Road in Davenport.
details: This project was added from a public City of Davenport Facebook listing surfaced in search results. It should be manually verified before being treated as fully confirmed.

title: Publix Planned Near US 27 and Minute Maid Ramp Road 2
summary: A Publix grocery store and adjoining retail are planned near US 27 and Minute Maid Ramp Road 2 in Davenport.
details: Development news from Elevation Development says Publix plans a new grocery store with adjoining retail off US 27 and Minute Maid Ramp Road 2.

title: Central Polk Parkway East Planning Activity
summary: Central Polk Parkway East is being tracked as a major transportation project affecting the Davenport/Polk County growth corridor.
details: Florida's Turnpike project page lists public meeting activity for Central Polk Parkway East, including virtual and in-person meetings in April 2025.

title: Auburndale City News Added as Official Source
summary: The City of Auburndale news page has been added as an official source for local announcements and future development leads.
details: The Auburndale news page includes city news, newsletters, upcoming events, and links to planning/public notice areas that can become useful development leads.

title: Davenport Official Notices Added as Source
summary: The City of Davenport official website has been added as a source for notices, events, and government updates.
details: The Davenport official website includes latest notices, events, city information, and public updates useful for tracking municipal growth.
